payload.answer: I see a conflict: the existing memory says Sam works at Goldman, while the other memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. No new message content was provided to determine which is current.

entity_resolution.reason: No new input content provided; only existing conflicting statements are referenced.

details: Detected inconsistency between two employment assertions about Sam.
Did not commit any durable memory update due to lack of new confirming input.

repair_options: Ask the user which company Sam currently works at (Goldman, Point72, or neither).
Request the source/timestamp for each statement to decide recency.
Store both statements as historical with dates (e.g., “previously at Goldman (until <date>)” and “currently at Point72 (<date> - present)”) if the user provides timing.
